Class SLExpressionResolver

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation.SLExpressionResolver
Direct Known Subclasses:
JMLBuiltInPropertyResolver, SLAttributeResolver, SLMethodResolver, SLTypeResolver
public abstract class SLExpressionResolver extends Object
Expression resolvers are used by specification parsers (e.g. for JML or OCL) to translate complex expressions to terms. Subclasses of this abstract base class deal with specific operators that may occur in specification expressions.

  • Method Details

    • isVisible

      protected final boolean isVisible(MemberDeclaration md, KeYJavaType containingType)
      Checks whether the passed member, contained in the passed type, is visible in specInClass.

    • doResolving

      protected abstract SLExpression doResolving(SLExpression receiver, String name, SLParameters parameters) throws SLTranslationException
      Resolves property calls on explicit receivers.
      Parameters:
      receiver - receiver (may *not* be null)
      name - name of the property
      parameters - the actual parameters, or null if not applicable
      Returns:
      a suitable term or collection if successful, null otherwise
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • resolve

      public final SLExpression resolve(SLExpression receiver, String name, SLParameters parameters) throws SLTranslationException
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • canHandleReceiver

      protected abstract boolean canHandleReceiver(SLExpression receiver)
